block_00: What does a perfect indicator look like?
block_01: If asked to trade using only one technical analysis indicator, what would you choose? A lot of traders would go with MACD, and for a good reason. This tool can effectively spot emerging trends — probably the most important component of a successful trade.
block_02: You definitely have to give this amazing indicator a try. But first, learn more about how it works and how to apply it in practice!
